_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate common Tactics, Techniques and Procedures (TTP) used in malware and open-source and Intelligence Community (IC) resources available to identify emerging TTPs
reference_document_element_description: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.437), SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.428).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.307). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ability, available, common, community, emerging, evaluate] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, ai, application, audit, controls, defenses] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.832 (P=0.821, R=0.842). R exceeds P by 0.021 — the WIDAI KSA's 16 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 24 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.4%, N:76.5%, C:23.2%). No dominant classification for "Ability to evaluate common Tactics, Techniques and Procedures (TTP) used in malw" vs "Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.447 > STS 0.307 (gap +0.140). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.8%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ability, available, common, community, emerging, evaluate]. WIDAI terms: [access, ai, application, audit, controls, defenses].
